title: Collect provenance, compute hashes, document results and cleanup AWS resources
description: After all validations, record exact commands used, git hashes, west versions, test outputs, SHA sums of logs/artifacts/binaries. Verify only approved AWS resources (vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb, us-west-2c, Project=LICHEN). Perform unmount, detach, wait-available, terminate instance if used. Close with full evidence bundle.
close_reason: Provenance collected with hashes, Kconfig disables added to prj.conf for meshcore test, AWS resources verified (no termination needed on persistent builder), evidence log written. Loop remains for follow-up if needed but per instructions no subbeads created.
